_comment: The target_length_exceeded fixture: projected new word count (2585) exceeds max_words (2400). The plan footer MUST flag this with target_length_flag = exceeds_max so the operator sees the budget violation at a glance and can decline items before --apply runs. --apply itself does NOT refuse on a flagged target — the flag is an advisory, the operator's edit decision is the gate.
operator_action_advisory: decline items to land within target before --apply
comment_on_apply_semantics: exceeds_max is advisory; --apply still runs on an unedited plan, the resulting memo will exceed target_length and the next memo-review will deduct on dim 7 (Scope discipline) accordingly.
